mapper.select: SELECT t.*, IFNULL(s.today_pv, 0) AS todayPv, IFNULL(s.today_uv, 0) AS todayUv, IFNULL(s.today_uip, 0) AS todayUip FROM t_link t LEFT JOIN t_link_stats_today s ON t.full_short_url = s.full_short_url AND s.date = CURDATE() AND s.del_flag = 0 WHERE t.gid = #{gid} AND t.enable_status = 0 AND t.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{orderTag} = 'todayPv' THEN IFNULL(s.today_pv, 0) END DESC, CASE WHEN #{orderTag} = 'todayUv' THEN IFNULL(s.today_uv, 0) END DESC, CASE WHEN #{orderTag} = 'todayUip' THEN IFNULL(s.today_uip, 0) END DESC, CASE WHEN #{orderTag} = 'totalPv' THEN t.total_pv END DESC, CASE WHEN #{orderTag} = 'totalUv' THEN t.total_uv END DESC, CASE WHEN #{orderTag} = 'totalUip' THEN t.total_uip END DESC, t.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_link t WHERE t.gid = #{gid} AND t.enable_status = 0 AND t.del_flag = 0
